case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ILEANA SOMARRIBA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OR REDUCED FILING FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SOMARRIBA, ILEANA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-14-2014
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; CIVL CASE COVER SHEET; DEC OF VENUE; DEC OF REDUCED FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED NOV-26-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOMARRIBA, ILEANA
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT SOMARRIBA, ILEANA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SOMARRIBA, ILEANA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOMARRIBA, ILEANA $2,193.33 PRINCIPAL, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,442.33, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $100.00 DUE ON THE 12TH DAY OF EACH MONTH: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 17025035) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SOMARRIBA, ILEANA
